Moderator und „Loki“-Star Tom Hiddleston sowie der ausführende Produzent von „Loki“, Kevin R. Wright, arbeiten für die Serie erneut zusammen. Die beiden verbindet filmisch inszeniertes Drama mit investigativer Dokumentarerzählung und versetzt das Publikum ins antike Rom – in die Stunden vor und während des Vesuvausbruchs. Unterstützt von einem Team aus Archäologen, Historikern, Geologen und Katastrophen-Experten deckt Hiddleston bemerkenswerte Beweise auf – und erzählt die Geschichten echter Menschen, die lang gehegte Annahmen über Pompeji und dessen letzte Stunden infrage stellen. Dabei kommt unter anderem ans Licht, dass viele von der Katastrophe betroffene Menschen durchaus eine Überlebenschance hatten.

snippet.description:
Offizieller "Marsupilami" Trailer Deutsch German 2026 | Abonnieren ➤ https://abo.yt/kc | (OT: ) Jean Reno, Philippe Lacheau Movie Trailer | Kino: 20 Aug 2026 | Filminfos https://KinoCheck.de/film/rkd/marsupilami-2026?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description
Es läuft alles nicht so optimal für den in einem Zoo angestellten David (Philippe Lacheau). Seine Ex-Frau Tess (Élodie Fontan) macht ihm wie gewohnt Vorwürfe, wenn er ihr den gemeinsamen Sohn Léo (Corentin Guillot) mal wieder zu spät zurückbringt. Dabei hat Léo nur einen Wunsch: Gemeinsame Ferien mit Mama und Papa unter einer Bedingung – sie dürfen sich nicht streiten. Kurz darauf wird David von seinem zwielichtigen Boss (Jean Reno) vor die Wahl gestellt: Entweder kann er den Hyänen im Zoo als Futter dienen oder ein geheimnisvolles Paket während einer Kreuzfahrt von Südamerika nach Frankreich schmuggeln. Und zur Tarnung darf auch die ganze Familie mit.

snippet.title: KrawallBrüder - Ich will dass Du mich willst
snippet.description:
Single im Streaming: 👉 https://kbrecords.lnk.to/IwdDmW
Neue Album "1993" vorbestellen: 👉 https://kbrecords.lnk.to/1993 

Die "Brüder" veröffentlichen am 11.09.2026 Ihr neues Album "1993".

Hier die erste Single-Auskopplung "Ich will dass Du mich willst" die etwas runder als gewohnt um's Eck kommt aber spätestens im Refrain das volle KB Potential ausschöpft und zum nächsten Topsong der Band mutieren wird! Rockig, rund und eingängig mit der unnachahmlichen KB Intonation rauh und doch melodisch!

Eine Story zwischen "Sid & Nancy" oder "Bonny & Clyde", wie es sich jeder von seiner Beziehung wünscht!

"...ich will dich ficken, mit Dir tanzen und lachen - Auf den Scherben von 1000 Whisky Flaschen"

snippet.title: PR-Disaster für Shrek 5 - Fans zerlegen den Trailer
snippet.description:
Diese Woche eskaliert der *Shrek 5-Shitstorm:* DreamWorks deaktiviert nach massiver Kritik die Kommentare zum ersten Teaser. Fans beschweren sich über das neue Design von Fiona und Shrek, die Tonalität des Films und den Eindruck, dass die Reihe ihre bissige Märchen-Satire verloren hat. Gleichzeitig sorgt *Spider-Man: Brand New Day* für wilde Spekulationen: Mutiert Peter Parker zum Monster? Der neue Trailer deutet organische Netze, körperliche Veränderungen und eine mögliche Six-Arms-Storyline an.

Außerdem sprechen wir über den neuen Spider-Man-Trailer, den Shrek-5-Backlash, Austin Powers 4, Zendayas drohenden Overkill, Amazons überraschenden Ausstieg aus Luca Guadagninos OpenAI-Film *Artificial* mit Andrew Garfield, Netflix-Streit mit den Stranger-Things-Machern, Saul Goodmans Rückkehr, die Kinocharts, Trailer-Highlights, Streaming-News und die wichtigsten Gaming-Themen der Woche.

snippet.title: INSANE (Official Music Video) - Black Gryph0n & Baasik
snippet.description:
In celebration of the 5-year anniversary of our Platinum Record "INSANE"!
https://open.spotify.com/track/5flerg6aEao2VayZezVlgu?si=dEFvFn77TI6hGC50kBbHyg&dl_branch=1

Words can not describe how blown away I am by this music video. I'm honored and humbled to have such talented people bringing our song to life!! PLEASE give them all a follow and hire them for your projects (while you still can)!!

Arina Samson

Leslie Erkocevic

Compositing:
Luximus
torteraex

Sound Design/Editor:
Baasik
Luximus

‘Alastor’ and ‘Hazbin Hotel’ belong to Vivienne Medrano

This fan animation is non-canon and is not officially affiliated with Spindlehorse Productions.

LYRICS-----------

Dearly beloved,
For your entertainment, it's my pleasure to introduce to you Hell’s latest arrival;
The equal-opportunity killer, Alastor!

Hello, it’s nice to meet you!
Can you tell me where I am?
I don’t know how I got here
But I think I’m starting to understand.
I don’t belong among the angels
And baby, that’s just fine with me.
The things I did up there were high school
But now I’m going for my degree

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?
Haven’t been the same since I expired
Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire
And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire!

CHORUS -

Wait a minute, do I know you?
Weren’t you an old pal of mine?
Departed from us far too early
But now we’re meeting a second time.
We used to have such fun together
And maybe you have what I need
But first, I have one tiny question
Tell me, do you demons bleed?

CHORUS -

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?
Haven’t been the same since I expired
Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire
And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire!

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?

END-----------

HELLO DDR's (Dedicated Description Readers)
What a crazy journey this has been... It's moments like this that put life into perspective! When we wrote this song 5 years ago, Nate had just gotten out of the Navy, I had just started shifting gears from Impressions to original music, and we were all trying to figure out how to make a living doing what we love: making music and videos.

Since then, my brother and I have written multiple charting records, been featured in Fortnite, NCIS, Poppy Playtime, Billie Bust Up, Garten of Ban Ban, and America's Got Talent (twice)! I became a pilot and bought my own airplane, Claire became a producer for Rob Riggle's podcast "Riggle's Picks", and Nate (is very private, but his life has also changed in so many ways). This song helped define the business that we run today and we couldn't be more grateful! So, to everyone who made this possible, THANK YOU!!!

snippet.title: CG5 - Not Supposed To Love Me [Ode to JAX] (The Amazing Digital Circus Song Animation)
snippet.description:
STREAM "Not Supposed To Love Me" NOW ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/NotSupposedToLoveMe

Song by @CG5
Animation by @CodaAnim
Guitars by @FamilyJules7X

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5covers107, & @cg5instrumentals461
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS:

I’ve abandoned hope,
Looking for something that was real.
I’ll try not to think about it,
I don’t want to feel.
Cuz it’s all just too much to carry.
It’s all much too wrong.
I’ve lived in levity so long.

I'm forever haunted by the choices that I made.
A weight beyond imagining that never seems to fade.
For every scar I've left behind comes back to me in waves.
I run from love, I run away.

Cuz despite it all, I’m fine,
Despite the pain we shared.
I told you stories, told you lies.
I never shoulda dared open the door.
The tears of the past mean nothing anymore.
And you’re not supposed to miss me.

To hell with everyone,
Who ever swore they’d help me,
Don’t you tell me what I want.
Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man.
I’m never looking back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.

Family fell apart, made me feel like I was weak.
So I cut them from my life, my feelings buried far beneath.
No, I do not deserve to be forgiven of my sins.
Shut up and leave me in ruins.

Cuz despite it all, I’m fine,
Despite the pain we shared.
I told you stories, told you lies.
I never shoulda dared open the door.
The tears of the past mean nothing anymore.
And you’re not supposed to miss me.

To hell with everyone,
Who ever swore they’d help me,
Don’t you tell me what I want.
Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man.
I’m never looking back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.

You’re making this so hard.
Won’t let me disappear.
Somehow you see me in the dark.
Too long I lived in fear, now it’s too late.
No I don’t want to go,
But I chose my own fate,
I hate you, but you’ll still miss me.

So thank you everyone,
Whoever tried to help me.
After all that’s said and done,
You held me close, and made me understand.
But I’ll never come back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.
No!
You’re not supposed to love me.
No!
You’re not supposed to love me.

snippet.description:

Satalana 🎶

Doctore, dă-mi ceva să-mi fie bine,
Scrie-mi o rețetă pentru mine,
Am în suflet ceva ce doare,
Ia-l ușor și du-l în zare.
Vreau să scap de tot ce-apasă,
Ca o haină aruncată-n casă,
Am dat iubire fără măsură,
Dar n-a fost lumea fără ură.

Ohhh, satalana
Satalana lana

Satalana lana
Satalana 🎶

Cafeaua nu mă mai ridică,
Nici o vorbă nu-mi explică,
Sunt pe vibe-ul meu ușor,
Las problemele și zbor.
Capu’ sus și pas ușor,
Viața merge, n-am să mor,
Prea rapid trec toate-n zare,
Mâine-i altă întâmplare.

Ohhh, satalana

Satalana 🎶

Nu mai stau unde nu-i bine,
Țin aproape doar pe cine
Știe clar să fie om,
Nu doar vorbe în microfon.
Am văzut și rău și bine,
Dar aleg ce-i bun în mine,
Și de azi trăiesc mai calm,
Fără stres și fără dram’.
